title: Choba Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Choba, with a Z-Score of +3.49. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Choba is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 72%, and the wind speed is 10.2 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The impact of this heat wave is expected to be significant, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating a complete absence of cooler periods.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
